name: Rook Chessmon (Black)
description: A Digimon which has an appearance like a fortress which boasts impregnable defense. Although it's a gigantic Digimon it is very fast, and it defends against the opponent's strikes, then attacks. Its catchphrase is, "The opponent is nothing after me!" Its Special Moves are charging the opponent as it stands at attention, mowing them down and destroying them ( Stronghold ), and firing from the gunports on its arms ( Rook Gatling ). Also, it can use a stubborn, immovable, steadfast defense ( Castle Wall ).
